reasoning: 2631486f1bf.c L66: Pulse reports curr read without initialization. PC simplifies to !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc (CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES cancels out — both T and F cases appear). The real condition for the curr bug requires CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES=T; its cancellation in the PC makes the PC under-constrained in that dimension. Additionally, !_STDLIB_H is a restrictive library macro that over-constrains the PC. Since !_STDLIB_H is the dominant restrictive constraint that restricts to a non-standard compilation path, classified as TRUE_NEW_OVER.
